about.bio.1: My thinking never stops. Whether I'm analyzing enterprise user behavior, stress-testing an agentic interaction flow, or designing the trust signals that make an AI agent feel reliable — my mind is always solving the next layer of the problem. I've built things others said couldn't be done in the time allowed, and I've shipped them in production.
about.bio.2: What I'm told stands out most: my ability to translate what AI can actually do into what humans will actually trust — and to do it fast.
about.quote.text: The best AI agent is only as good as the experience around it. I design that experience.
about.title: A practitioner at the edge of agentic AI and human trust
about.value.0.desc: Every conversational interface, every human-in-the-loop checkpoint, every trust calibration state starts with genuine curiosity about how a specific human thinks under uncertainty.
about.value.0.title: Curiosity-led
about.value.1.desc: In agentic systems, the smallest missed interaction signal creates the largest adoption gap. I design for the edge case because the edge case is where trust is won or lost.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: I move fluidly between AI engineers, data scientists, product managers, and executive stakeholders — translating technical AI constraints into interaction decisions everyone can act on.
about.value.2.title: Communicator at heart
about.value.3.desc: Testable prototypes in days, not weeks. Reusable patterns that accelerate every engagement that follows. I build systems, not one-offs.
about.value.3.title: Builder by instinct

modal.project.0.challenge: Designed and shipped a production LLM-powered AI Persona Agent built on live business intelligence data. The system combined behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights — enabling enterprise teams to understand not just who customers were, but how and why they made decisions. Conversational flows, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, and trust calibration states were designed from first principles under compressed delivery timelines, with no existing template or precedent inside the organization.

modal.project.0.outcome.0: Reversed negative profitability — from a –17% operating margin to +2% within four months through agentic UX design driving targeted enterprise engagement.
modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in customer retention and subscription renewals from real, actionable behavioral insights surfaced through human-in-the-loop decision flows.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increased average cart size and customer lifetime value through confidence-signaling interaction patterns that reduced decision friction.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced customer acquisition friction through proactive agentic recommendations addressing user needs before escalation was required.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled enterprise awareness across ~40 users spanning sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership through trusted, auditable AI outputs.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: A production agentic AI platform built on live enterprise business intelligence data. Combines structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights — enabling teams to understand not just who customers are, but how and why they make decisions. Conversational flows and human-in-the-loop checkpoints designed to build enterprise user trust at scale.

modal.project.1.challenge: Architected and led delivery of a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented web and portal experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing reports, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal but a durable system of reusable UX patterns improving consistency, scalability, and execution speed — aligning interaction decisions with business outcomes across concurrent engagements.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Delivery Time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Recovered
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent interaction patterns across products — eliminating inconsistencies between designers and engineering teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: Shared source of truth clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for all design artifacts across concurrent engagements.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between UX strategy and business goals by embedding interaction intent directly into reusable system standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable patterns requiring no designer mediation.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Gained executive trust by providing visible, consistent standards referenced across deliverables org-wide — 60–90% adoption.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in Contentful — enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth. Reusable UX patterns and interaction templates materially improved delivery speed, design quality, and team confidence across the organization.

modal.project.2.challenge: Defined the experience strategy and interaction design for a new membership join flow and entrepreneurial advancement pathway. The core challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing members to join in compliance with company requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understand the value proposition — without confusion, friction, or trust failure at critical decision points.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn Reduction
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified value proposition at tier selection — reducing hesitation and trust failure at the most critical decision point.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved transparency and confidence in cart and checkout through clearer expectations, guided success states, and human-in-the-loop decision support.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led membership activation as a first-class experience with clear confidence signaling throughout the flow.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for members advancing toward entrepreneurial participation through simplified escalation pathways.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable join and advancement framework aligned with long-term retention and enterprise growth objectives.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: Reframes membership as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, social platforms, and subscription mechanics across landing pages, cart, and checkout. Designed to build user trust at each step, encourage first-time visitors to join with confidence, and support sustainable entrepreneurial growth.

modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-volume enterprise e-commerce platform facing critical revenue leakage from checkout abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining user trust and interaction flows that diverged significantly from modern enterprise UX standards positioned this as a business recovery effort — not a visual refresh.

modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven cart experience addressing user uncertainty at the critical point of purchase decision.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive load in checkout flows by eliminating unnecessary steps, ambiguity, and trust-breaking interaction patterns.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled subscriptions as a first-class action with clear confidence signaling directly within the cart interaction flow.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern enterprise UX standards — closing the gap with top-performing interaction patterns and conversion benchmarks.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Growth in revenue, retention, and trust metrics through isolated, measurable interaction design improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring user trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart — including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap that aligns interaction decisions with measurable business outcomes.

modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and interaction design for a new sitewide intelligent search system to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to rely on external search engines to find products — directly undermining enterprise user confidence and conversion performance.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: AI-Powered Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth Target
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore enterprise user trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results grounded in NLP and behavioral signal.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results — graceful error handling rather than silent failure.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and confidence-signaling interaction patterns.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single coherent enterprise search experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish intelligent search as a strategic enterprise tool supporting subscriptions, membership, and long-term user retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Enterprise search is a trust layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer and NLP-informed interaction design, the new system delivers exact, high-confidence results, guides users when intent is unclear, and surfaces recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions.
